requirement_topic.zh: 波斯尼亚 50 Hz 230/400 V 电网配置
requirement_topic.zht: 波斯尼亞 50 Hz 230/400 V 電網配置

summary.en: Solar PV inverters for Bosnia and Herzegovina should be configured and documented for the local 230/400 V 50 Hz low-voltage profile, with protection thresholds and permissible ranges validated per project, operator, and connection-point settings. Although both China and Bosnia use 50 Hz, Bosnian projects commonly differ from Chinese nominal profiles and interconnection documents should reflect Bosnia-specific voltage windows and DERK/NOS BiH expectations.
summary.zh: 面向波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的光伏逆变器应按当地 230/400 V 50 Hz 低压配置进行设置和文件化，且需按项目、运营方和接入点设置验证保护阈值和允许范围。虽然中国与波斯尼亚均为50 Hz，但波斯尼亚项目常见参数与中国名义配置存在差异，接入文件应反映波斯尼亚电压窗口和DERK/NOS BiH要求。
summary.zht: 面向波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那的光伏逆變器應按當地 230/400 V 50 Hz 低壓配置進行設定和文件化，且需按專案、營運方和接入點設置驗證保護閾值和允許範圍。雖然中國與波斯尼亞均為50 Hz，但波斯尼亞專案常見參數與中國名義配置存在差異，接入文件應反映波斯尼亞電壓窗口和DERK/NOS BiH要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 50160 voltage characteristics of electricity supplied by public distribution networks
Bosnia and Herzegovina project-specific interconnection settings

summary.en: China inverter defaults are commonly built around domestic 50 Hz grid operation and China grid-code profiles, including GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964. The shared frequency does not eliminate the need to check Bosnia-specific voltage windows, protection parameters, neutral/earthing assumptions, and project commissioning settings.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器默认配置通常围绕中国50 Hz运行及中国并网规范，包括GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964。频率相同并不免除核查波斯尼亚特定电压窗口、保护参数、中性点/接地假设及项目投运设置。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器默認配置通常圍繞中國50 Hz運行及中國併網規範，包括GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964。頻率相同並不免除核查波斯尼亞特定電壓窗口、保護參數、中性點/接地假設及專案投運設置。

gap.en: The gap is not nominal frequency alone. Exporters should provide Bosnia-specific grid-profile settings, allowable voltage/frequency ranges, over/under-voltage and over/under-frequency trip settings, reconnection delays, power-factor/reactive-power controls, and commissioning evidence for each firmware release.
gap.zh: 差距不只是标称频率，而是完整国家配置。出口商应提供波斯尼亚电网参数集、允许电压/频率范围、过/欠压与过/欠频脱扣设置、重连延时、功率因数/无功控制及每个固件版本的投运证据。
gap.zht: 差距不只是標稱頻率，而是完整國家配置。出口商應提供波斯尼亞電網參數集、允許電壓/頻率範圍、過/欠壓與過/欠頻脫扣設定、重連延時、功率因數/無功控制及每個韌體版本的投運證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project interconnection or commissioning in Bosnia requires grid-profile and protection settings under DERK/NOS BiH review
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China nominal 50 Hz settings do not automatically satisfy Bosnia voltage/frequency and protection requirements

source.publisher: Independent System Operator of Bosnia and Herzegovina (NOS BiH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Even with 50 Hz, verify Bosnia 230/400 V settings and protection logic in the exact BOS context before energization, especially for projects with any Croatia corridor interconnection path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使中国和波斯尼亚均为50 Hz，也应在送电前确认波斯尼亚特定230/400 V设置和保护逻辑，尤其涉及克罗地亚走廊通道联动的项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使中國和波斯尼亞均為50 Hz，也應在送電前確認波斯尼亞特定230/400 V設置和保護邏輯，特別是涉及克羅地亞走廊通道聯動的專案。
